meaning: adj.未指明的,未详细说明的
examples: The story takes place at an unspecified date.
The company said that an unspecified number of people were offered jobs.
With fairy tales, however, the location is generally unspecified, no matter who the storyteller is.
The lawsuit, which seeks unspecified damages, is still pending in state court in Ohio.
The governor also reassigned William Howard, his liaison with the state police, to an unspecified position.
